sample_reviews.author: James R.
sample_reviews.text: Fantastic service from Malpas — turned up on time, fixed our electrical fault quickly and left everything clean and tidy. Highly recommended.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M.
sample_reviews.text: Used Malpas for a bathroom plumbing job and couldn't be happier. Professional, reasonably priced and great communication throughout.

sample_reviews.author: Tom B.
sample_reviews.text: Reliable and knowledgeable team. Sorted our consumer unit upgrade with no fuss. Will definitely use again for future electrical work.

brand.usp: Malpas Electrical & Plumbing combines expert electrical and plumbing trades under one roof, giving Manchester homeowners and businesses a reliable, single point of contact for all their property maintenance needs.
brand.hero_headline: Expert Electrical & Plumbing Services Across Manchester
brand.about_paragraph: We're Malpas Electrical & Plumbing, a trusted trades team based in the heart of Manchester. We cover everything from full rewires and fuse board upgrades to bathroom plumbing and emergency callouts — so you don't need to juggle multiple contractors. We take pride in honest pricing, tidy workmanship, and getting the job done right first time.
